title: acalypha variabilis
intro: Acalypha variabilis, also known as the variable leaf acaleypha, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Acalypha variabilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions when consumed in moderation.
